titleStmt.title: SII 33.242: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 242. (A.R. No. B 285 of 1953.) Bangānapalle, Banganapalle Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Pillar built into the gateway of the fort.
This is dated Śaka 1533, Sādhāraṇa, Jyēśṭha ba. 11 corresponding to 1611 A.D., May 28, Tuesday. The cyclic year was Virōdhikṛit.

Records a grant of the village Babatuturipāḍu situated in Banagānapalle-sīma by Bhāvarāju, son of Timmarājayya and grandson of Pōchirāju Avubhalarājayyadēva-mahārāja to the god Chennakēsavaperumāḷ of Banagānapalle. The donor is said to have obtained the Banagānapalle-sīma as amaranāyaṅkara from the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyu
daya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁ
bulu 1533 Agunēṭi sādhāra
ṇa saṁvvatsara jēṣṭa ba 11 lu śrīma
drājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa śrīvīraveṁkaṭapatidēva ma
hārāyalayyavāru penugoṁḍa siṁ
hvāsanamaṁddu pṛthvisāmrājyaṁ śē
yucuṁḍḍagānu śrīmadakhilāṁ
ḍḍakōṭi braṁhmāṁḍḍanāyaka vēdavedāṁ
tavēdya purāṇapuruṣōttama sakala ji
va dayāparuṁḍaina banagānipalai cana
kēśava perumāḷa divya śrīpādapadma
bulaku śrīviśvāmitragōtraṁ Ā
ptasaṁbasūtraṁ yajuśyākhādhyā
yulaina śrīman mahā maṁḍḍalēśva
ra pōcirāju Avubhaḷrājayya dē
vamahārājulugāri pautrulaina tiṁ
mmarājayya vāri putrulaina bhāva
rājugāru savinaya bhayabha
ktini sāṣṭāṁggadaṁḍaṁ samarpiṁ
cci Iccina bhūdhāna dharmaśāsa
nakramameṭlannanu veṁkaṭapatidēva
mahārāyalayyavāru mā
ku Amaranāyaṁkkarānaku pāli
ṁccina banagānipalle śīmalōni ba
batulūripāṭigrāmānaku ca
tuśīmakulōnainacēnu kha 13
2 Akṣarālānu padmūḍu
vuṭlu muttumu cenu yī grā
mānaku cellē Aṣṭabhōgatēja svā

di sahitaṁgānu grāmaṁ
dhāravosi yīstimi yi
digāka banagānipallenu
veṁnnakaṁḍlatrovaku tūpu
na cēnu kha . 2 veṁnnakaṁḍla
grāmāna kha 1 vubhaya
ṁ cenu kha 1 . 29 purvā
na celledi banagānipalle
nu kha 1 . 2 mōtuka
la vāṁgu ceruvulo kōnina
nimityaṁ cēnu gā kani vi
cina cēnu kha 1 . 4 Āṁtu cē
nuṁkhaṁna gāritōṁṭa sa
hāgānu kha 2 . 1 na batta
lūripāṭigrāmamun yi
tathātithi Ēkādaśi puṇyakā
lamaṁdu sahiraṇyōdakadāna
dārāpūrvakaṁgānunnu
Digital edition of SII 33.242 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
